title: linum alpinum subsp. leonii
intro: Linum alpinum subsp. leonii, also known as the Alpinum or Mountain flax, is a species of flax that is native to the Balkan Peninsula. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Linum alpinum subsp. leonii include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
